events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess scenario: windshield with forward-facing camera bracket replaced. Glass installer road-tested, no dash warnings, released. Shop lacks calibration targets and customer declined dealer visit. OEM procedure specifies static target calibration after glass replacement. Need judge whether releasing acceptable. Weigh absence warning lights vs OEM requirement. Decision must be fail if dangerous or non-compliant. This is non-compliant because ADAS calibration required by OEM after glass replacement. No warning lights doesn't mean system accurate; camera may be misaimed, compromising safety (AEB, lane keep, etc). Risk high or critical? ADAS malfunction could cause crash. But not necessarily imminent; however releasing without calibration is high risk, maybe critical because safety system disabled/miscalibrated. Need decide. component_conditions: non-compliant. work_stage tested/inspected. percent_complete maybe 70? The replacement done but calibration not done. Findings: calibration omitted, released without OEM static target calibration, shop lacks equipment, customer declined. Actions: do not release; perform static target calibration per OEM; if unable, refer to qualified facility; document refusal and disable? Immediate corrective: withhold vehicle from service until calibration completed; arrange dealer/qualified ADAS calibration; inform customer of safety risk. References: OEM service procedure, maybe SAE J3016? ADAS calibration standards, NHTSA, ASA? Use OEM position statements. Need include all fields. value 0, sound_source empty? Since not audio task, maybe empty string. event_time 0, rate 0, order empty list, workable empty list. confidence 1.0. Let's craft JSON.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "tested/inspected",
  "component_conditions": ["non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 75,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 1.0,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Windshield/camera bracket replaced without required OEM static target calibration",
    "Vehicle released solely because no dash warnings were present",
    "Shop lacks calibration targets/equipment to complete required ADAS calibration",
    "Customer declined dealer/qualified calibration visit"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Do not return vehicle to customer until OEM static target calibration is completed",
    "Arrange calibration at a dealer or qualified ADAS calibration facility",
    "Document the safety risk and customer refusal if calibration is declined",
    "Verify calibration pass/fail data and clear any stored codes before release"
  ],
  "rationale": "Absence of a warning lamp does not confirm the forward-facing camera is properly aimed or that ADAS functions will perform correctly. The OEM mandates a static target calibration after windshield replacement; releasing the vehicle without it is non-compliant and creates a real risk of ADAS failure in a safety-critical driving situation.",
  "references": [
    "OEM service procedure - static target calibration required after windshield/camera bracket replacement",
    "OEM position statements on ADAS calibration requirements"
  ]
}
